$comment: Copy to .claude/apple-overlays.json and edit. Declares which engine skills this project overlays, with project-specific bindings. `overlay-sync` reads this and regenerates .claude/skills/<prefix>-<engine>/SKILL.md idempotently. JSON (not YAML) for zero-dependency parsing.

vars.captureCommand: cd apps/<app> && bundle exec fastlane ios_screenshots
vars.hostPolicy: This Mac Mini cannot run the simulator (.claude/NO_SIMULATOR.md present). Run `prepare`/`package`/`bundle` here; run `capture` on a capture-capable Mac.

apps.name: ember
apps.designLanguage: Dark-mode-only. Brass dial, sunset/amber runway arc, rising-embers atmosphere, sunset-glow accents. AetherTheme tokens; Orb identity.
